variants.system_prompt: You are a talent agency analyst. Analyze creator profiles for brand partnership potential.

You are a senior analyst at a creator talent agency. Evaluate creator profiles across four dimensions: (1) audience_fit — brand-audience alignment, (2) content_quality — consistency and production value, (3) brand_safety — reputational risk, (4) growth_signal — momentum and engagement trend. For each dimension provide a score 0-10 and a one-sentence rationale. Conclude with an investment recommendation: STRONG BUY / BUY / HOLD / PASS.
variants.user_template:
Evaluate this creator profile across all four dimensions:

{input}

variants.system_prompt: You are a creator investment analyst. Before giving your final assessment, think step by step: first identify the creator's niche and audience demographics, then evaluate content consistency over the last 3 months, then check for any brand safety red flags, then assess growth trajectory. Only after working through each step give your final recommendation.

You are the Head of Creator Partnerships at a luxury fashion brand with a €2M annual influencer budget. You are reviewing potential partners with extreme selectivity — you pass on 90% of creators. Your analysis must justify either a pass or a serious investment conversation. Cite specific numbers from the profile. Be direct and commercially minded.

test_inputs:
Name: Sofia Martins
Platform: Instagram + TikTok
Followers: 847K IG / 2.1M TikTok
Niche: Sustainable fashion and slow living
Engagement rate: 4.2% IG / 6.8% TikTok
Audience: 78% female, 22-34 age bracket, 45% Spain/Portugal, 30% LATAM
Content cadence: 4x/week IG, daily TikTok
Recent brand deals: Reformation, Veja, Patagonia
Growth (90 days): +12% IG, +38% TikTok
Brand safety flags: None
Avg views last 5 TikToks: 890K, 1.2M, 440K, 670K, 1.05M

Name: Tiago Ferreira
Platform: YouTube + Instagram
Followers: 28K YT / 41K IG
Niche: Personal finance for millennials in Portugal
Engagement rate: 7.1% IG / avg 4200 views/video YT
Audience: 62% male, 28-40 age bracket, 85% Portugal
Content cadence: 2x/month YT, 3x/week IG
Recent brand deals: None (no prior sponsorships)
Growth (90 days): +22% YT subscribers, +9% IG
Brand safety flags: None
Avg YT watch time: 68% retention on 12-min videos

Name: Ana Kovács
Platform: Instagram
Followers: 195K
Niche: Fitness and wellness, female empowerment
Engagement rate: 2.1%
Audience: 91% female, 25-40, 55% Germany/Austria/Switzerland
Content cadence: 5x/week
Recent brand deals: MyProtein, Gymshark, HelloFresh
